title: Expert Diagnosis in Algorithmic Game Theory
description: A flowchart illustrating the process of diagnosing strategic situations using expert knowledge to model and solve games.
relationships: Expert observes and interprets the Strategic Situation
Expert informs the creation of a Game Theoretic Model
Algorithmic Solution Concept is applied to the model
Predicted Outcome is compared to Real-World Outcome
Discrepancies generate Diagnostic Feedback to refine the model or expert interpretation
